description: Scoped filesystem access for asset libraries, reference folders, and shared drives outside the project.
setupNote: Replace CHANGE_ME_TO_ALLOWED_PATH with one or more absolute paths the agent may read/write. Add extra path arguments (one per line) for multiple roots. Requires Node.js on the host.

description: Issues, pull requests, releases, code search via GitHub's official MCP server. Runs via Docker.
setupNote: Requires Docker on the host. Create a fine-grained personal access token at https://github.com/settings/tokens and paste it into the GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN env value above.

description: Up-to-date API docs for thousands of libraries — great for Godot/Blender/Houdini Python APIs that drift between versions.
Fetch and convert web pages to markdown. Useful for tutorials, docs, and forum answers.
setupNote: Requires uv installed on the host (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/). uvx will auto-install the Python package on first run.

description: Persistent cross-session memory as a local knowledge graph.
Web, local, image, video and news search via the official Brave Search MCP server.
setupNote: Set BRAVE_API_KEY. Get a free key at https://brave.com/search/api/.
